rationale: The cited paper appears plausibly relevant as a theory source: it establishes how metacognitive ease/difficulty in preference formation shifts choice behavior, and the citing paper explicitly studies heuristic vs. systematic processing and framing-driven shifts in premium choice. Given this conceptual overlap in process-level choice mechanisms (despite only one DOI-matched reference and no local citation context), this is not clearly an incidental mention and merits second-stage review.
